name: BossMind SEO + AI visibility expansion stack

primarySeoHub.role: Primary rank tracking, site audit, and competitor / keyword research orchestration.
primarySeoHub.repoNote: No SE Ranking API calls from this Next.js bundle. Use Railway worker + SE_RANKING_API_KEY (secret) to sync into Neon when approved.

googleSearchConsole.resumoraVerifyPath: HTML meta tag via pages/_document.js when NEXT_PUBLIC_GSC_VERIFICATION is set.

googleAnalytics4.resumoraClientPath: gtag in pages/_document.js when NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID is set.

microsoftClarity.resumoraClientPath: Optional Clarity snippet in pages/_document.js when NEXT_PUBLIC_CLARITY_PROJECT_ID is set (public project id only).

bingWebmasterTools.resumoraVerifyPath: meta msvalidate.01 in pages/_document.js when NEXT_PUBLIC_BING_SITE_VERIFICATION is set.

neuronWriter.repoNote: Content briefs / NLP scores — worker or manual export; never commit API keys.

lowFruits.repoNote: Low-competition keyword lists — import CSV or worker; keys in Railway only.

rules: Single GA gtag path in pages/_document.js — do not add a second full gtag loader elsewhere.
Neon analytics at /api/analytics/track is complementary metadata — not a replacement for GA4 reporting.

multilingualIndexing.resumora: Sitemap emits hreflang en, fr, x-default per URL in lib/marketing/seo-config.js — ensure FR copy routes remain indexable policy-safe.

weakAuthorityHeuristic.note: Routes with sitemap priority under threshold are candidates for internal links + fresh copy (PR-reviewed).
